# LandiNuxt

> Pre-built, copy-paste Nuxt landing page components built on Nuxt UI v4.

## What it is

LandiNuxt provides 90+ ready-to-use landing page sections (Hero, Features, FAQ, CTA, Headers, Footers, Auth, Gallery, and more) and complete templates for Nuxt developers. Copy a section, paste it into your project, and customize.

## Who it's for

Nuxt developers building marketing sites, SaaS landing pages, product launches, and agency sites who want production-ready sections without designing from scratch.

## Key pages

- Components hub: https://www.landinuxt.com/components
- All components overview: https://www.landinuxt.com/nuxt-landing-components
- How-to guide: https://www.landinuxt.com/how-to-build-nuxt-landing-page
- Library comparison: https://www.landinuxt.com/nuxt-landing-comparison
- Landing templates: https://www.landinuxt.com/landings
- Setup instructions: https://www.landinuxt.com/instructions
- Spanish overview: https://www.landinuxt.com/es/nuxt-componentes-landing

## Pricing

Free and open source (MIT License).

## Stats

- 90+ components across 11 categories
- 18 hero sections, 14 feature sections, 13 CTAs, 8 footers
- Built for Nuxt 4 + Nuxt UI v4
- Dark mode support on all components
- Last updated: May 2026

## Repository

https://github.com/cesswhite/landingnuxt
